page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion ~Roar to the Future~
text:
is a pachinko machine commemorating the 25 years of the partnership between Evangelion and Bisty. This machine focus on the story of Neon Genesis Evangelion, but for the first time, utilizes the Evangelion Final Model of Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA and Another Number - Unit Null from Evangelion: Another Impact. To commemorate it, a remix of Soul's Refrain sung by Yoko Takahashi and with guitars by MIYAVI, was used in its promotion, in a TV video called . Another theme was also released, called Final Call by Yoko Takahashi.

Trivia

A limited web music video was released with scenes of Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone, Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance and Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo as Yoko Takahashi and MYAVI plays in the foreground.
